project_metadata.name: Remote_AI_OS_v2
project_metadata.description: Local AI assistant with SQLite database for relational mapping of Agents, Tasks, and Workflows. Features a Master AI for routing and dynamic CrewAI assembly.
project_metadata.architecture_rules: CRITICAL RULE: APPEND ONLY AND PRESERVE CODE. Data source of truth is SQLite (database.sqlite). YAML files in /config are used for configuration and as portable exports. Strictly adhere to directory structure: /config, /db, /tools, /core, /ui.

tasks.title: Project Initialization & Folders
tasks.description: Ensure folders exist: /config, /db, /tools, /core, /ui. Generate requirements.txt. Create `core/data_manager.py` for .env and YAML legacy support.

tasks.title: SQLite Schema & DB Manager
tasks.description: Create `db/database.sqlite`. Implement `core/db_manager.py` with tables: 1) Models (id, provider, model_name), 2) Agents (id, name, role, backstory, model_id, tools_json), 3) Tasks (id, description, expected_output, agent_id), 4) Workflows (id, name, task_ids_json, requires_human_check). Implement CRUD functions for all tables.

tasks.title: UI: API Vault & Model Registry
tasks.description: In `ui/dashboard.py`, create Tab 1 for API Keys. Create a sub-section 'Model Registry' to add/remove LLM models (e.g., GPT-4, Llama3 via Ollama) into the SQLite 'Models' table.

tasks.title: UI: Agent Caserma (DB-driven)
tasks.description: CRITICAL: Preserve Tab 1. Create Tab 2 to manage Agents. Fields: Name, Avatar, Role, Backstory. Use a dropdown to select the Model from the 'Models' table. Save all data to the SQLite 'Agents' table.

tasks.title: UI: Task & Workflow Builder
tasks.description: CRITICAL: Preserve Tabs 1 & 2. Create Tab 3 to define Tasks (linked to Agents) and Tab 4 to assemble Workflows (ordered list of Tasks). Save to SQLite 'Workflows' table. Add an 'Export to YAML' button for backup.

tasks.title: File & Web Tools
tasks.description: Develop `tools/local_tools.py` with functions to read/write files and perform web searches. Ensure tools return strings for CrewAI compatibility.

tasks.title: Terminal Executor Tool
tasks.description: Develop `tools/terminal_executor.py` for safe shell command execution with strict validation.

tasks.title: Master AI & Ethical Router
tasks.description: Create `core/master_ai.py`. Fixed Master AI agent with ethical constraints. Logic to decode user intent and map it to existing Workflow IDs in the Database.

tasks.title: Dynamic SQL Crew Builder
tasks.description: Create `core/crew_builder.py`. Function `build_crew(workflow_id)`: 1) Query DB for workflow tasks. 2) Join with Agents and Models. 3) Instantiate CrewAI Agent and Task objects dynamically. 4) Return executable Crew.

tasks.title: Security & Dynamic DB Menus
tasks.description: In `bot.py`, implement USER_ID whitelist. /start command queries SQLite 'Workflows' table to generate Inline Buttons dynamically.

tasks.title: Pre-Flight Check & Execution
tasks.description: CRITICAL: Preserve M4_T1. Implement ConversationHandler: Button Click -> Show Tasks from DB -> Capture user edits via Master AI -> Execute Crew via M3_T2 -> Return progress and final result.
